title: autobench.adversarial.round_complete v1
description: Aggregate outcome of one Code-A1 / SAGE generate→solve→judge round. Emitted once per AdversarialDual.run_round call with verdict counts, failure-mode categories, and mean score. Drives the curriculum-closing loop: when failure_categories is non-empty, the worker fell into a trap and the case becomes drift-resistant evaluation data for the next RSI iteration.

session_id.description: ULID for the autobench session that owns this round.

round_id.description: Round identifier (prefixed 'advr-' followed by a ULID).

n_cases.description: Number of curveballs generated and solved in this round.

failure_categories.description: Counts of failures by target_failure_mode. Only populated for steered cases the worker failed; an empty object means the worker handled every trap or no traps were steered.

mean_score.description: Arithmetic mean of per-case p_score values in [0.0, 1.0].
